one_time_description: Purchase of fishing licenses by consolidated entity from related party; recorded at $250M transaction amount (fair value $323M), Band's consolidation portion was $89,653,006 - resulted in purchased fishing licenses jumping from $3.4M to $118.1M
economic_notes: Membertou Properties Limited Partnership is a GBE accounted for on modified equity basis. Band also holds investments in Membertou Hotel Limited Partnership ($2.8M), Encyt Technologies ($76K), and Sydney Harbour Investment Partners ($7.7M). Major fishing license acquisition during year. Children's Trust Fund maintained for all children on Band list.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified - auditor states 'basis for our qualified opinion' in the report. Major one-time event: consolidated entity purchased fishing licenses from a related party recorded at $250M (fair value $323M), Band's consolidation share was $89.65M, causing purchased fishing licenses to jump from $3.4M to $118.1M and long-term debt to jump from $81.5M to $206M (new FNFA borrowings of ~$119M). Membertou Properties LP is a GBE on modified equity basis. Note 22 (Government transfers detail) appears missing from the text provided. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text. Segment disclosure table was cut off before Enterprise segment totals were complete.
